testimonials.sectionTitle: Trusted by Hundreds of Satisfied Clients

items.name: Martijn De Vries
items.content: Tipto installed beautiful glass balustrades on our terrace. The quality and finish are exceptional. The entire process was professional and within the agreed timeframe.

items.name: Sophie Van den Berg
items.content: As an architect, I regularly work with Tipto on my projects. Their craftsmanship and attention to detail make them a reliable partner for any construction project.

items.name: Thomas Janssen
items.content: The garage doors and windows Tipto delivered for our new construction projects are of excellent quality. Reliable service and competitive prices.

meta.title: About Tipto BV — 17+ Years of Craftsmanship in Belgium
meta.description: Discover the story behind Tipto BV. For over 17 years your specialist in custom balustrades, windows, doors, garage doors, stairs and balconies in Belgium.

hero.title: 17+ Years of Passion for Craftsmanship
hero.subtitle: Tipto BV is a leading Belgian company specializing in custom solutions for both residential and commercial projects.

story.title: From Vision to Craftsmanship
story.content: Since our founding, we have strived to deliver the highest quality in custom solutions. With over 17 years of experience, we combine traditional craftsmanship with innovative technologies. Our materials — tempered glass, stainless steel, aluminium and sustainable wood — are carefully selected for their quality and durability.

services.title: What We Offer
services.maintenance: Maintenance and repair of all your products
services.smart: Smart home integration and energy-efficient solutions

meta.title: Custom Balustrades — Stainless Steel, Aluminium & Glass | Tipto BV
meta.description: Premium custom balustrades in stainless steel, aluminium and glass. Discover our collection and design your ideal balustrade with our 3D simulator.

hero.title: Balustrades that Unite Elegance and Safety
hero.subtitle: Custom-made balustrades in stainless steel, aluminium or glass. Every design is crafted with precision for a perfect combination of safety and aesthetics.

inox.title: Stainless Steel Balustrades
inox.description: Stainless steel with a timeless appearance. Extremely durable and low maintenance.

powderCoated.title: Powder-Coated Stainless Steel
powderCoated.description: Colour of your choice with the durability of stainless steel. The perfect combination of style and functionality.

aluminum.title: Aluminium Balustrades
aluminum.description: Lightweight and versatile. Ideal for modern architecture with a sleek finish.

glass.title: Glass Balustrades
glass.description: Transparent and elegant. Maximum view with optimal safety.

simulatorCta.title: Design Your Own Balustrade
simulatorCta.subtitle: Use our 3D simulator to compose your ideal balustrade.

items.question: What materials do you offer for balustrades?
items.answer: We offer balustrades in stainless steel, powder-coated stainless steel, aluminium and glass. Each material can be custom finished to your preferences.

items.question: How long does balustrade installation take?
items.answer: Installation time depends on the complexity and scope of the project. A standard balustrade is typically installed within 1-2 days.

items.question: Are glass balustrades safe?
items.answer: Absolutely. Our glass balustrades are made from tempered safety glass that meets all European safety standards. They are extremely strong and durable.

items.question: Do you offer warranty on balustrades?
items.answer: Yes, all our balustrades come with an extended warranty. We are happy to discuss the exact warranty conditions with you during the quote process.

meta.title: Custom Windows — PVC, Aluminium & Wood | Tipto BV
meta.description: Energy-efficient custom windows in PVC, aluminium and wood. Up to 30% energy savings. Expertly installed by Tipto BV throughout Belgium.

hero.title: Windows that Combine Comfort and Energy Efficiency
hero.subtitle: High-quality custom windows in PVC, aluminium or wood. Maximum insulation, minimum energy consumption and a refined appearance for every home.

pvc.title: PVC Windows
pvc.description: Excellent insulation at a competitive price. Maintenance-free and available in many colours.

aluminum.title: Aluminium Windows
aluminum.description: Slim and modern. Strong profiles with maximum glass surface for more light.

wood.title: Wooden Windows
wood.description: Warm, natural appearance. Durable wood with excellent insulation properties.

items.question: Which type of window is most energy efficient?
items.answer: All our window types offer excellent insulation. PVC windows typically score best on thermal insulation, but aluminium and wooden windows offer comparable performance with triple glazing.

items.question: How long does it take to install new windows?
items.answer: Production time averages 4-6 weeks after measurement. Installation itself takes 1-3 days, depending on the number of windows.

items.question: Can I get subsidies for new windows?
items.answer: Yes, various subsidies exist in Belgium for energy-efficient windows. We are happy to help you apply for available subsidies in your region.

meta.title: Custom Doors — Interior & Exterior | Tipto BV
meta.description: Premium custom doors in wood, aluminium and composite. From classic interior doors to modern exterior doors. Craftsmanship by Tipto BV.

hero.title: Doors that Make an Impression at Every Threshold
hero.subtitle: From stylish interior doors to robust exterior doors — every door is custom crafted with premium materials and an eye for detail.

wood.title: Wooden Doors
wood.description: Timeless elegance in solid wood. Available in various wood types and finishes.

aluminum.title: Aluminium Doors
aluminum.description: Modern and low maintenance. Slim profiles with superior insulation.

composite.title: Composite Doors
composite.description: The best of both worlds. The appearance of wood with the durability of modern materials.

items.question: What material is best for an exterior door?
items.answer: Aluminium and composite are excellent choices for exterior doors due to their durability and weather resistance. Wooden exterior doors offer a warm appearance but require more maintenance.

items.question: Can you supply doors with smart lock systems?
items.answer: Yes, we can equip all our doors with smart lock systems. From fingerprint scanners to app-controlled locks — we advise you on the best solution.

meta.title: Custom Garage Doors — Sectional, Tilting & Roller | Tipto BV
meta.description: Automatic custom garage doors. Sectional doors, tilting doors and roller doors with professional installation. Belgian craftsmanship by Tipto BV.

hero.title: Garage Doors that Combine Functionality and Design
hero.subtitle: Sectional doors, tilting doors and roller doors — every garage door is custom made with automatic operation and premium finish.

sectional.title: Sectional Doors
sectional.description: The most popular choice. Space-saving and available in various panels and colours.

tilt.title: Tilting Doors
tilt.description: Classic and reliable. A solid choice for standard garages.

roller.title: Roller Doors
roller.description: Maximum space savings. Ideal for garages with limited space.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions about Garage Doors

items.question: Which type of garage door is most popular?
items.answer: Sectional doors are by far the most popular thanks to their space-saving design, excellent insulation and wide range of designs and colours.

items.question: Can existing garage doors be automated?
items.answer: In many cases, an existing garage door can be equipped with an automatic operating system. We are happy to visit to assess the possibilities.

meta.title: Custom Stair Balustrades — Glass, Steel & Aluminium | Tipto BV
meta.description: Premium custom stair balustrades and railings in glass, steel and aluminium. Safety and design for every staircase. Craftsmanship by Tipto BV.

hero.title: Stair Balustrades that Combine Safety and Style
hero.subtitle: Custom-made balustrades and railings for every staircase. From modern glass panels to sleek steel constructions — we ensure safety with a premium look.

glass.title: Glass Stair Balustrades
glass.description: Transparent and modern. Maximum light and visibility with tempered safety glass.

steel.title: Steel Stair Railings
steel.description: Industrial and robust. Clean lines with the strength of steel.

aluminum.title: Aluminium Stair Balustrades
aluminum.description: Lightweight and versatile. Modern profiles with powder coating in any colour.

features.title: Features
features.combination: Combinable with glass, steel or aluminium

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions about Stair Balustrades

items.question: What materials do you offer for stair balustrades?
items.answer: We offer stair balustrades in glass, steel and aluminium. Each material can be custom finished and combined to your preferences.

items.question: Can you install balustrades on an existing staircase?
items.answer: Yes, we install balustrades and railings on both new and existing staircases. Our specialist will visit to assess the possibilities.

items.question: How long does stair balustrade installation take?
items.answer: Installation time depends on the complexity and type of staircase. On average, installation takes 1-2 days.

meta.title: Custom Balconies — Modern & Classic | Tipto BV
meta.description: Premium custom balconies in aluminium, steel and glass. Modern and classic designs with durable materials. Expertly installed by Tipto BV.

hero.title: Balconies that Transform Your Outdoor Space
hero.subtitle: From modern sleek balconies to classic wrought iron designs — we create balconies that increase the value and comfort of your home.

aluminum.title: Aluminium Balconies
aluminum.description: Lightweight, durable and low maintenance. The most popular choice for modern homes.

steel.title: Steel Balconies
steel.description: Robust and versatile. From industrial to classic wrought iron.

glass.title: Glass Balconies
glass.description: Transparent and modern. Maximum view with an elegant appearance.

items.question: Do you need a building permit for a balcony?
items.answer: In most cases, a building permit is required for installing or renovating a balcony. We are happy to advise you on the permit requirements in your municipality.

items.question: How do I maintain my balcony?
items.answer: Aluminium and glass balconies are virtually maintenance-free — annual cleaning is sufficient. Steel balconies require periodic protective treatment.

hero.title: Our Projects
hero.subtitle: View a selection of our most recent projects. Each project is proof of our craftsmanship and dedication to quality.

meta.title: Our Process — From Contact to Installation | Tipto BV
meta.description: Discover how Tipto BV works. From the first contact and measurement to production and installation — we guide you at every step.

hero.title: Our Process
hero.subtitle: From the first conversation to the perfect installation — we guide you at every step of the process.

steps.title: Contact & Advice
steps.description: Get in touch and tell us about your project. We listen to your wishes and give you personal advice.

steps.title: Measurement
steps.description: Our specialist visits your home for precise measurements and discusses the possibilities on site.

steps.title: Design & Quote
steps.description: Based on the measurements, we design your product and prepare a transparent custom quote.

steps.title: Production
steps.description: After approval, we start production with the highest quality standards and carefully selected materials.

steps.title: Installation
steps.description: Our craftsmen install your product expertly and neatly, with respect for your home.

steps.title: Aftercare & Service
steps.description: After installation, we remain available for maintenance, repairs and questions. 24/7 customer service.

meta.title: Frequently Asked Questions — FAQ | Tipto BV
meta.description: Answers to frequently asked questions about our products, services, prices and process. Everything you want to know about Tipto BV.

hero.title: Frequently Asked Questions
hero.subtitle: Find quick answers to the most common questions about our products and services.

items.question: In which regions is Tipto active?
items.answer: Tipto BV is active throughout Belgium, with a focus on Antwerp and surroundings. We are happy to visit you for a free measurement.

items.question: How can I contact Tipto?
items.answer: You can reach us by phone (0466 49 18 51), email (info@tiptobv.be) or the contact form on our website. We are available 24/7.

items.question: What products does Tipto offer?
items.answer: We specialize in balustrades, windows, doors, garage doors, stairs and balconies. All products are custom made with premium materials.

items.question: Can you renovate existing products?
items.answer: Yes, in addition to new installations, we also offer renovation and maintenance of existing products. Contact us for an assessment.

items.question: How does the quote process work?
items.answer: After a free measurement at your home, we prepare a detailed, transparent quote. There are no obligations attached to the quote.

items.question: Do you offer financing options?
items.answer: We are happy to discuss payment options with you. Contact us for more information about our payment arrangements.

items.question: How long does an average installation take?
items.answer: Installation time varies per product and project. On average, an installation takes 1-5 days. We always give you a realistic schedule in advance.

items.question: Do you clean up after installation?
items.answer: Of course. Our craftsmen leave your home tidy after installation. We take all waste and packaging materials with us.

meta.title: Contact & Request a Quote | Tipto BV
meta.description: Contact Tipto BV for a free, no-obligation quote. Call, email or fill in the form. Koekoekstraat 25, 2630 Aartselaar.

hero.title: Let's Discuss Your Project
hero.subtitle: Tell us about your project and receive a free, no-obligation custom quote. We respond within 24 hours.
